title: Figure-Ready Data Assembly: JRN Paper Visualization Specifications from 5 Experiments
summary: Demo notebook that loads pre-computed figure-ready data from 5 JRN (Join Reproduction Number) experiments and visualizes 6 paper figures: JRN heatmaps (join×task matrices), cross-task transfer correlation matrices (Kendall's W), cost-efficiency convergence curves, compounding model comparisons (R² fits), FK-shuffling decomposition (structural vs feature signal), and probe validity forest plots. Uses a curated 13-example subset across all 6 figure types from the original 106-example evaluation output. Produces a 6-panel overview visualization and summary metrics table.
